heading: Timing Breakdown
body:
The timing breakdown describes execution statistics pertinent to an
areas of query execution. The following fields
show the timing breakdown:

| Field            | Type     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ---------------- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| millisElapsed    | Long     | Approximate wall-clock time elapsed performing tasks in this area including the amount of time the children of the query spent in this area. The value is approximate number of milliseconds elapsed while performing tasks in this area. |
| invocationCounts | Document | Number of invocations of tasks included in this area. The value is a map of task names to their invocation count.                                                                                                                         |
